metadata.name: streamlit-colab
metadata.summary: Run Streamlit apps on Google Colab with ease

functions.name: streamlit_colab.core.setup_ngrok
documentation:
Sets up ngrok tunneling for the given port.

```
param token

ngrok authentication token.

param port

Port for Streamlit to run on.

return

Public URL of the ngrok tunnel.
```

functions.name: streamlit_colab.core.run_streamlit
documentation:
Runs the Streamlit app on the specified port with ngrok tunneling.

```
param app_path

Path to the Streamlit app file.

param token

ngrok authentication token.

param port

Port for Streamlit to run on.
```

functions.name: streamlit_colab.core.main
documentation:
Command-line interface for streamlit_colab.
Usage: stc <app.py> <ngrok_token> [--port PORT]

functions.name: streamlit_colab.core.cli
documentation: Entry point for the stc command-line interface.
